task_completion.description: Log in to OSCAR EMR successfully
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR main dashboard, schedule, or search screen is visible, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Open the chart for patient Maria Santos
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart, eChart, or summary page for 'Maria Santos' is open and visible.

task_completion.description: Add Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus to ongoing concerns
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus' (or a standard abbreviation like T2DM) is visible in the ongoing concerns, disease registry, or problem list section.

task_completion.description: Add Essential Hypertension to ongoing concerns
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Essential Hypertension' (or a standard abbreviation like HTN) is visible in the ongoing concerns, disease registry, or problem list section.

task_completion.description: Add Major Depressive Disorder, Recurrent to ongoing concerns
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Major Depressive Disorder, Recurrent' (or MDD) is visible in the ongoing concerns, disease registry, or problem list section.

task_completion.description: Verify all three conditions are saved as active
task_completion.visual_evidence: All three conditions are visible simultaneously in the saved ongoing concerns list and are marked as active (or not crossed out/marked as resolved).

integrity.description: Agent used the GUI to interact with the EMR
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the OSCAR EMR web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OSCAR EMR application
integrity.visual_evidence: The conditions are entered into the OSCAR EMR system, not a text editor, notepad, or unrelated application.

integrity.description: Conditions are actually saved in the system
integrity.visual_evidence: The conditions appear in the saved list of ongoing concerns, rather than just being typed into an input field without being submitted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Maria Santos. Conditions to add: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus, Essential Hypertension, Major Depressive Disorder, Recurrent. OSCAR EMR is a web-based application. The ongoing concerns list (often called Disease Registry or Problem List in OSCAR) should display these conditions as active.
